log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Autognome — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.

→ 1/1 targets affected.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Autognome — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Autognome — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Autognome — Bardic Musician HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Autognome — Bardic Musician HP: 35/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Autognome — Bardic Musician --- HP: 35/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
